name: Spire Inc.
description: Spire Inc. is a public utility holding company based in St. Louis, Missouri, that primarily engages in the purchase, retail distribution, and sale of natural gas. Serving residential, commercial, and industrial customers, the company operates through its regulated utility subsidiaries while also pursuing non-regulated business opportunities. Spire is committed to providing reliable energy services, investing in infrastructure, and supporting the communities it serves across several states in the United States. The company is publicly traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol SR.
